title: audit — cache keys + tags
description: Redis caches for tenant retention policy resolution + audited-events catalog + purge-liveness marker.

keys.description: Cache of active AuditRetentionPolicy for tenant. Contents: { retention_years, override_starts_at, override_ends_at, cached_at }. Read on every PurgeExpiredAuditsJob invocation for the tenant.
Cache of vendor default events + registered custom transitions. Rebuilt at boot; hot on every AuditObserver::creating call for event-name validation.
Timestamp of the last successful PurgeExpiredAuditsJob completion. Written after each nightly run. Read by PurgeJobLivenessProbe.
Accumulator for the weekly AuditPurgeCompletedNotification digest. Incremented on each AuditPurgeExecuted event by AccumulatePurgeDigestListener. Read + reset on Sundays.

Freeze marker written by FreezeRetentionOnTenantSuspendedListener when a tenant is suspended. When present, PurgeExpiredAuditsJob skips the tenant. Removed by ThawRetentionOnTenantResumedListener on resume.
Rolling 7-day baseline of audit fire rate per tenant. Written by an hourly rollup job; read by FireRateAnomalyProbe.
Daily export request counter per tenant. Incremented on POST /api/v1/audits/export. Compared against config-derived rate limit (20/day baseline).
